meaning: n.閾呴敜,閲嶈嵎vi.鍨傜洿钀戒笅
examples: The glamour stocks of the age saw their values plummet.
Everyone expects Broadway's box office to plummet in September.
After menopause, when estrogen levels plummet, some women become forgetful.
The changes initially caused ratings to plummet to well below the crucial eight million mark.
Temperatures could plummet to -20C (-4F) in parts of the south later, setting new local records.
